full_text:
Han Fan 韓範
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Fan (韓範). Feigned surrender to Cao Cao but was persuaded by Xu Huang to genuinely surrender. Han Fan was affiliated with Yuan Shang and the Wei Kingdom.
